analysis_commentary: Third replicate: stable, 134 steps, max bounded [0.019, 0.042], illegal fell slightly 0.997→0.9377, non-collapsing. Across 3 replicates of identical params: 2/3 non-collapse, 1/3 collapse — confirmed seed-variance at the accepted-best config. illegal_min=0.9377 still much worse than current best's 0.235 (build-drift + insufficient steps under build 352). Regressed.
